title: Chelavara Falls
tagline: Chelavara Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Chelvara Falls is a natural waterfall formed by small stream, a tributary of Kaveri near Cheyyandane village which is on Virajpet - Talakaveri State Highway (SH 90) around 16 km fr
overview.description: Chelvara Falls is a natural waterfall formed by small stream, a tributary of Kaveri near Cheyyandane village which is on Virajpet - Talakaveri State Highway (SH 90) around 16 km from Virajpet, in the state of Karnataka, India. It is located on the way to Kabbe Holidays Homestay and is near Thadiyandamol, the highest point in Kodagu. The falls is visible after walking 200 meters into the forest from the place available for parking. One can easily get into dangerous waters and pulled in.

topPlaces.name: Ainmanes
topPlaces.description: An ainmane is the ancestral house of a clan with roots in Kodagu.

topPlaces.name: Tadiandamol
topPlaces.description: Tadiandamol or Thadiyandamol is the highest mountain of Madikeri taluk Kodagu district, Karnataka, India. It is the third highest peak in Karnataka, after Mullayyanagiri & Kudremukha.

items.note: An ainmane is the ancestral house of a clan with roots in Kodagu.
Tadiandamol or Thadiyandamol is the highest mountain of Madikeri taluk Kodagu district, Karnataka, India. It is the third highest peak in Karnataka, after Mullayyanagiri & Kudremukha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chelavara Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chelavara Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chelavara Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (107 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chelavara Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chelavara Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chelavara Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Chelavara Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chelavara Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ainmanes, Tadiandamol.
